name: Mohammad Sohail Qureshi
title: Full-Stack Developer
summary:
I am a Full-Stack Developer and Technical Lead with over 9 years of experience in designing, developing, and delivering enterprise-grade applications across the Banking & Financial Services and Healthcare domains. 
 My expertise includes Java, Spring Boot, Angular, React, Node.js, REST APIs, Microservices, SQL, and cloud-based application development. Throughout my career, I have successfully led cross-functional teams, mentored developers, and driven the end-to-end delivery of scalable, high-performance software solutions. /n Currently, I am working as a Lead Analyst at CGI, serving as a Lead Engineer for PNC Bank, where I contribute to the development of an enterprise analytical banking platform. My responsibilities include technical leadership, solution architecture, code reviews, performance optimization, stakeholder collaboration, and mentoring engineering teams to deliver high-quality products.
